preconditions: Verify the Home page is loaded in guest state.
Verify the user is unauthenticated before starting the workflow.

testCases.title: Verify unauthenticated guest user can open the Login page from the Home page person/profile button
steps: Launch the WashTab application and navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Verify the Home page is displayed in guest state without authenticated user identity visible.
Click the person/profile button on the Home page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application transitions from the Home page guest state to the Login page and the Username field, Password field, Login button, Back button, and Home button are visible and interactive.

testCases.title: Verify Login page controls are visible and interactive after opening Login page from Home page
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Verify the Username field accepts keyboard focus.
Verify the Password field accepts keyboard focus.
Verify the Login button is clickable.
Verify the Back button is clickable.
Verify the Home button is clickable.
testCases.expectedResult: All approved Login page controls are visible, enabled, focusable where applicable, and interactive without UI errors or broken SPA state.

testCases.title: Verify password input is masked while typing valid credentials
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page person/profile button.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Type Carwash#1 in the Password field.
testCases.expectedResult: The Password field masks the entered password characters during input and the actual password text is not visibly displayed on screen.

testCases.title: Verify successful authentication using approved credentials returns user to authenticated Home state
steps: Navigate to the Home page in guest state.
Click the person/profile button to open the Login page.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application authenticates the user successfully, returns to the Home page in authenticated state, displays authenticated user identity information, and shows authenticated-only feature areas.

testCases.title: Verify authenticated Home page state persists immediately after successful login transition
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter approved credentials with Username krisadmin and Password Carwash#1.
Click the Login button.
Observe the Home page after authentication completes.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home page reloads in authenticated state with authenticated user identity visible and authenticated-only features available without showing guest-only unauthenticated state indicators.

testCases.title: Verify invalid username and password combination displays generic Failed message and keeps user unauthenticated
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page person/profile button.
Enter invaliduser in the Username field.
Enter InvalidPass#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, the application does not transition to authenticated Home state, and the user remains unauthenticated on the Login page or equivalent unauthenticated state.

testCases.title: Verify blank Username and blank Password submission displays only generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, only the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message is shown, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify submission with Username populated and Password blank displays generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Leave the Password field empty.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify submission with Password populated and Username blank displays generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Leave the Username field empty.
Enter Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed without separate required-field validation messaging, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify leading and trailing whitespace handling for approved credentials
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter space followed by krisadmin followed by trailing spaces in the Username field.
Enter leading and trailing spaces around Carwash#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
Observe the resulting authentication behavior.
testCases.expectedResult: The application handles credential values containing leading or trailing whitespace according to implemented business behavior and the observed result is consistently reflected through either authenticated Home state or the generic Failed message while maintaining correct authentication state.

testCases.title: Verify whitespace-only Username and Password values are rejected with generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter only space characters in the Username field.
Enter only space characters in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, no dedicated required-field validation message appears, and the user remains unauthenticated.

testCases.title: Verify Back button returns the user to the Home page without authentication
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page person/profile button.
Click the Back button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in unauthenticated guest state without displaying authenticated user identity or authenticated-only feature areas.

testCases.title: Verify Home button returns the user to the Home page without authentication
steps: Navigate to the Login page from the Home page person/profile button.
Click the Home button on the Login page.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in unauthenticated guest state and the user is not authenticated.

testCases.title: Verify invalid password for approved username does not authenticate the user
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter krisadmin in the Username field.
Enter WrongPassword#1 in the Password field.
Click the Login button.
testCases.expectedResult: Authentication fails, the generic Failed message is displayed, the application remains unauthenticated, and authenticated-only Home page features are not displayed.

testCases.title: Verify repeated invalid login submissions consistently display the same generic Failed message
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter invalid credentials in the Username and Password fields.
Click the Login button three consecutive times after each failure.
testCases.expectedResult: Each failed authentication attempt displays the same generic Failed message, the user remains unauthenticated, and no additional or inconsistent validation messages are displayed.

testCases.title: Verify user remains unauthenticated after failed login followed by Home page navigation
steps: Open the Login page from the Home page.
Enter invalid credentials and click the Login button.
After the Failed message appears, click the Home button.
testCases.expectedResult: The application returns to the Home page in guest state after the failed login attempt and authenticated user identity information is not displayed.
